LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantCitizenship.descr: Mutanti sú akceptovaní ako plnohodnotní členovia komunity. Ich zmenené telá nie sú prekážkou spolupatričnosti, pokiaľ stoja s kolóniou.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantCitizenship.label: mutantné občianstvo
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantMasters.descripti: Mutanti sa považujú za prirodzených dozorcov nad odpadmi. Ich sila im dáva právo vládnuť, najmä nad nezmutovanými robotníkmi, ktorí sú pod nimi.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantMasters.label: mutantných majstrov
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantPurge.description: S mutantmi sa zaobchádza ako so škvrnou na civilizácii. Ich prítomnosť v kolónii je nebezpečná, ponižujúca a mala by byť potlačená všade, kde je to možné.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantPurge.label: mutantné čistenie
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantSlaves.descriptio: Mutanti sú cenení predovšetkým ako kasta otrokov. Sú silní, nebezpeční a najlepšie sa držia v reťaziach, kde sa dá ich práca bezpečne využiť.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantSlaves.label: mutantných otrokov
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_SecondClassMutants.desc: Mutanti môžu zostať vnútri spoločnosti, ale len v nižšej kaste. Sú užitočné, keď sú podriadení a pracujú pod prísnym dohľadom.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_Utobitha.description: Skutočnú mutantnú vlasť by mali budovať mutanti a pre mutantov. Pôvodní odpadlíci sú tolerovaní len ako problém, nikdy nie ako právoplatní členovia vytváraného poriadku.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_Utobitha.label: Utobita
LanguageData.GauranlenConnection_Strong.description: Ισχυρή πίστη στη διατήρηση μιας ισχυρής σύνδεσης με τον Treefather, πηγή δέντρου και λοβών.
LanguageData.TreeConnection.description: Η πίστη στον ιερό δεσμό μεταξύ του αποίκου και του Treefather, ενός μεταλλαγμένου δέντρου που παράγει δέντρα και λοβούς.
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.description: Travel to a remote destination using the Hellion. Unless you build a mooring mast, your current map and anything not on Hellion deck plating will be permanently lost. You will not be able to return.
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.label: Hellion launch
LanguageData.AnimaTreeLinking.description: Link with the wise Mothman spirit through meditation and ritual.
LanguageData.AnimaTreeLinking.label: Mothman ritual
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowHonor.description: Issues a commendation to a worthy pawn.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowHonor.label: issue commendation
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowTitle.description: Commissions a government rank for a worthy pawn.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowTitle.label: commission rank
LanguageData.VFEE_ParadePrecept.label: presidential parade
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalAddress.description: Initiate a presidential address from the dais. {ORGANIZER_labelShort} is giving a presidential address from the dais. If all goes well, every ranked participant will gain a small amount of Votes, and {ORGANIZER_labelShort} will gain Votes for each ranked participant. If it goes poorly, the speech will cause social strain and {ORGANIZER_labelShort} will lose Votes for each ranked participant. The outcome depends on {ORGANIZER_labelShort}'s social abilities. Whitespring officials currently in the area will join the address and count as ranked participants.
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalAddress.label: presidential address
LanguageData.ThroneSpeech.description: Initiate a presidential address from the presidential chair. All colonists will come and listen. If it goes well, listeners will feel inspired, and gain respect for the speaker. If it goes poorly, the address will do social damage. The outcome depends on the speaker's social abilities.
LanguageData.ThroneSpeech.label: presidential address
